title: $ldir
text: $ldir Return the name of the working directory. $ldir () Return Values Name of the working directory, which can be located in a ZIP archive. Use Allowed in all component types. Description The working directory is set by one of the following: The directory in which the application is started Command line switch /dir , which overrides the start-up directory Related Links /dir Specify the working directory for a Uniface application. Syntax of File and Directory Names You can choose to specify file and directory names generically or using platform-specific names—the ProcScript statements and functions for local file system management accept both.
